results.title: Metal L-Brackets | Marlin Steel
results.snippet: L-brackets to attach a vertical component to a horizontal surface, or vice versa. True to its name, an L-bracket is a brace with a right angle, which creates an "L" shape. Also called angle brackets or corner brackets, L-brackets are available in a wide variety of sizes and reinforcement options.
